description.it: Gestione e visualizzazione dei dati; modelli lineari, generalizzati e a effetti misti; SEM; simulazione; meta-analisi; metodi bayesiani e design analysis. Pacchetti dichiarati: lavaan, lme4, glmmTMB, blavaan, brms, ggplot2, ordinal, shiny, metafor, semTools, mclust, BayesFactor.
description.en: Data management and visualization; linear, generalized, and mixed-effects models; SEM; simulation; meta-analysis; Bayesian methods; and design analysis. Reported packages: lavaan, lme4, glmmTMB, blavaan, brms, ggplot2, ordinal, shiny, metafor, semTools, mclust, BayesFactor.

description.it: Gestione e visualizzazione dei dati, analisi statistica e basi di natural language processing con embeddings e modelli pre-trained tramite HuggingFace. Pacchetti dichiarati: numpy, pandas, seaborn, statsmodels, transformers. Uso tramite Colab, Spyder e RStudio.
description.en: Data management and visualization, statistical analysis, and foundational natural language processing with embeddings and pretrained models through HuggingFace. Reported packages: numpy, pandas, seaborn, statsmodels, transformers. Used through Colab, Spyder, and RStudio.
